mapper.sql: id, name, slug, description, sort, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.description, c.sort, c.create_time, c.update_time, COUNT(a.id) as articleCount FROM blog_category c LEFT JOIN blog_article a ON c.id = a.category_id AND a.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.sort ASC, c.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM blog_category
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_category SET sort = #{sort} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_category ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_category (name, slug, description, sort) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{sort})
